scripts.c-tail-web: npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/styles/tailwind/t_register.scss -o ./assets/styles/register.scss && npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/styles/tailwind/t_about.scss -o ./assets/styles/about.scss && npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/styles/tailwind/t_app.scss -o ./assets/styles/app.scss && npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/styles/tailwind/t_chat.scss -o ./assets/styles/chat.scss && npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/styles/tailwind/t_header.scss -o ./assets/styles/header.scss && npx tailwindcss -i ./assets/styles/tailwind/t_login.scss -o ./assets/styles/login.scss && npm run build
